Class CreateStructure

java.lang.Object
jogo.models.Structures.CreateStructure
public class CreateStructure extends Object
Factory and utility class responsible for instantiating game structures and retrieving their baseline costs and requirements. Centralizes construction logic for all valid StructureTypes values.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

      public CreateStructure()

  • Method Details

    • getMaterialCost

      public static int getMaterialCost(StructuresType structure)
      Retrieves the baseline material resource cost required to build a specific structure type.
      Parameters:
      structure - The StructuresType to query.
      Returns:
      The integer cost value of the primary building material.

    • getMaterialType

      public static ResourceType getMaterialType(StructuresType structure)
      Determines the specific resource type required as payment to construct a given structure type.
      Parameters:
      structure - The StructuresType to query.
      Returns:
      The required ResourceType, or ResourceType.NONE if unrecognized.

    • create

      public static Structures create(StructuresType structure, Player owner, int scoreModifier) throws GameException
      Factory method that instantiates a concrete subclass of Structures based on the provided type identifier.
      Parameters:
      structure - The StructuresType indicating which building to create.
      owner - The Player who will own the newly created structure.
      scoreModifier - The global score multiplier currently active.
      Returns:
      A newly initialized concrete implementation of Structures, or null if unmapped.
      Throws:
      GameException - If structure instantiation triggers unexpected baseline state violations.

    • getApCost

      public static int getApCost(StructuresType structure)
      Retrieves the Action Points (AP) required to execute the construction of a specific structure type.
      Parameters:
      structure - The StructuresType to query.
      Returns:
      The AP construction cost, or a restrictive high value if the type is unrecognized.

    • getStructureName

      public static String getStructureName(StructuresType type)
      Resolves the localized display name matching a structural type. Centralizes domain dictionary lookups to keep interface nodes decoupled from raw enums.
      Parameters:
      type - The active structural StructuresType identifier.
      Returns:
      A localized String representing the building context.

    • getProductionInfo

      public static String getProductionInfo(StructuresType type)
      Evaluates domain structural properties to build a comprehensive description of daily material and profit production metrics.
      Parameters:
      type - The structural StructuresType to evaluate.
      Returns:
      A formatted String mapping the dynamic yield properties of the target asset.
